name: Whitewater State Park (Middle Branch Whitewater)
notes: State park vehicle permit required; stocked plus wild browns.

name: Lanesboro State Fish Hatchery / Root River (Lanesboro)
notes: Town reach near the dam and DNR coldwater hatchery.

name: Forestville/Mystery Cave State Park (South Branch Root)
notes: State park vehicle permit required; classic Driftless water.

name: French River mouth (Scenic Hwy 61)
notes: Spring steelhead run; DNR fish trap on lower river.

name: Lester Park (Lester River, Duluth)
notes: City park on a stocked steelhead tributary of Lake Superior.
